common.endSessionTitle: End session and return to quiz hub
common.question: Question {number}

hero.title: Test your knowledge of the Holy Quran
hero.subtitle: Interactive quizzes on verse location, missing words, and sequence — for every level.

purpose.label: Why QuranGuessr?
purpose.title: Learn the Quran through play
purpose.desc: QuranGuessr turns passive recitation review into active, gamified practice. Whether you are a student, teacher, or lifelong learner — there is a mode for your level.
purpose.featureDeepenDesc: Regular quiz practice reinforces verse location, word recall, and sequential memory across all 114 Surahs.
purpose.featureCompeteDesc: An ELO-based ranking system means every ranked game matters. Climb the leaderboard against players worldwide.
purpose.featureDailyDesc: A shared daily challenge keeps you accountable. Compare your streak and accuracy with friends and the community.

quizModes.label: Quiz Modes
quizModes.title: Pick your challenge
quizModes.subtitle: Three distinct game modes — from daily community puzzles to competitive ranked play.
quizModes.locateDesc: A Quran verse appears on screen. Identify the correct page and row number. A fresh puzzle drops every day — the same verse for all players worldwide.
quizModes.missingWordDesc: A verse is shown with one or more segment(s) hidden. Guess the number of missing words. Every correct or incorrect answer shifts your ELO rating on the global ladder.
quizModes.nextVerseDesc: Given a verse, pick the one that comes right after it. Perfect for practising sequential recitation and strengthening your Quranic memory.
quizModes.translationDesc: Test your knowledge of Quran translations. Given a verse, identify the correct meaning from four options.

about.label: About
about.title: The person behind the project
about.authorBio: I built QuranGuessr to make Quranic study and muraja'a more interactive and enjoyable. Inspired by the daily-challenge format of GeoGuessr and the ranking systems in competitive games, I wanted to create something that motivates consistent, focused practice — while staying lightweight and free.

login.signInDesc: Sign in with your Quran.com account to save your progress and compete on the leaderboard! It's quick, easy, and free. Just click the button below to get started.
login.progressSynced: Your progress is being synced. Keep playing to climb the leaderboard!
login.knowledgeQuote: "Knowledge is a light that Allah casts into the heart."

section.chooseMode: Choose the mode that suits your learning style.

rankedCard.title: Missing Word Count
rankedCard.desc: Climb the global leaderboard. Guess the missing word count — every answer affects your ELO rating.
rankedCard.eloTooltip: Your ELO rating — starts at 1000. Correct answers increase it, wrong answers decrease it.
rankedCard.todayTooltip: {count} of {limit} ranked games played today. Resets at midnight UTC.
rankedCard.limitTooltip: Daily limit of {limit} ranked games reached. Resets at midnight UTC.

dailyCard.title: Locate the Verse
dailyCard.desc: 5 verses · same for everyone · new challenge each day · identify the page and row of an Ayah.

challenges.title: Challenge Categories
challenges.desc: Targeted mini-games to hone specific skills.
challenges.nextVerseDesc: Guess the next verse in sequence.
challenges.verseLocationDesc: Identify the page and row of an Ayah. Used in daily challenges.
challenges.missingWordDesc: Count the missing words in a verse.

integrity.title: Play with Integrity
integrity.desc: This is a test of what lives in your heart. Answer from memory only — do not open the Quran, consult a translation, or use any external aid. Let your score reflect your true connection with the Book of Allah.
integrity.pledge: I commit to answering from memory only, without peeking at the Quran or any other resource.

juzFilter.title: Juz Filter
juzFilter.desc: Questions will only come from the selected juz.

mwc.title: Missing Word Count
mwc.howMany: How many words are missing from this verse?
mwc.timesUp: Time's up! The answer was {count} missing word(s).

locateVerse.title: Verse Location
locateVerse.selectPageRow: Select the page number and row.

nextVerseQuiz.title: Next Verse
nextVerseQuiz.notQuite: Not quite — see the highlighted answer.

translationQuiz.title: Verse Translation
translationQuiz.selectMatching: Select the matching translation for this Ayah.

auth.signInDesc: Sign in to sync your progress and climb the leaderboards.
auth.termsPrefix: By signing in you agree to our

leaderboardPrivacy.title: Leaderboard Privacy
leaderboardPrivacy.visible: Your name and avatar are visible on the leaderboard.
leaderboardPrivacy.hidden: You appear as "Abdullah" on the leaderboard. Enable to show your real name.

leaderboard.playerDesc: Players ranked by their ELO rating earned through the Missing Word Count quiz.
leaderboard.pageDesc: Quran pages ranked by difficulty — higher ELO means players answer incorrectly more often.
leaderboard.dailyDesc: Top scores for today's 5-question Locate Verse challenge.
leaderboard.noDailyEntries: No one has completed today's challenge yet.
leaderboard.playerEloDesc: Your Player ELO reflects your performance against the {highlight}. ELO is calculated using a modified Glicko-2 system, which accounts for the number of questions answered to stabilize ratings for newer players.
leaderboard.dailyEloDesc: Each day, {highlight} are selected for everyone worldwide. Scores are based on how close your page & row guess is — perfect guesses earn up to 5,000 pts per question (25,000 total).
leaderboard.pageEloDesc: Unlike Surah-level tracking, Page ELO provides a {highlight} across the 604 pages. Pages gain ELO when players answer incorrectly.

statsPage.title: Community Stats
statsPage.subtitle: Aggregated across all game modes and players. Refreshes every 5 minutes.
